clustered_themes: Legal route validity remains the first control gate
Evidence coherence and process consistency drive dispute outcomes
Settlement and payroll treatment alignment is a recurring practical risk

source_fit_review.deduplication_note: Removed repetitive route-only and timeline-heavy framing; retained mixed source set across legal, practitioner, and business context.
key_uncertainties: City-level dispute practice can diverge despite national legal anchors.
Protected-status and evidentiary findings can alter route viability late in process.
Settlement tax treatment may differ by structure and local practice; local advisor confirmation remains necessary.
